Skip to content

Mounted React workspace

Clips

Clips Agent-Native template ported into Studio UI as a Harness-safe workspace surface with route inventory, provenance, resident-renderer blocks, and display-only agent/action affordances.

  • Archive
  • Dictate
  • Extensions Detail Detail
  • Extensions Detail
  • Extensions Index
  • Extensions
  • Insights Index
  • Library Index

error

Archive

Clips agent or action state is display-only until Jami Harness owns the runtime execution path.

long-content

Archive

  • Clips keeps the original Agent-Native route inventory visible while Studio UI renders safe resident components for Harness inspection.
